modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be several noticeable typos and some repeated wording or phrases.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Zebra label printer not printing after adding new labels.

full_description_text: 
The user reported that the Zebra printer is not working and has a red flashing light. They mentioned that after adding new labels, the printer stopped functioning. This issue needs to be addressed as the user is unable to print labels now.
short_description: Zebra label printer not printing after adding new labels.
description: The user reported that the Zebra printer is not working and has a red flashing light. They mentioned that after adding new labels, the printer stopped functioning. This issue needs to be addressed as the user is unable to print labels now.
